positive: A striking, symmetrical celestial mandala design featuring blooming lunar lilies and intertwining geometric nebulae patterns. The composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a circular frame. Style: Highly detailed neo-traditional etching mixed with minimalist vector art. Use a strong, limited color palette of deep indigo, creamy parchment white, and metallic silver accents. The linework must be crisp, clean, and highly defined, resembling a sophisticated tattoo flash sheet. The overall mood should be ethereal, mysterious, and deeply balanced. Perfect symmetry and visual flow are crucial. High contrast, clean silhouette, illustrative quality, suitable for apparel print.
negative: photorealistic, photo, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, malformed, noise, low resolution, gradient, abstract background, writing, messy, cartoon
